steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The parenthetical defines these features as impromptu deviations of performers when fidelity to an established musical score is not mandated. The word “impromptu” is decisive: it means spontaneous, done without prior preparation.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Extemporaneous is the precise word for performance without preparation—the defining characteristic of these deviations. The other three either contradict this quality or describe something unrelated to spontaneity. That matches choice D — D is correct.
